description: Parc Riviera Mews – Exclusive 90-unit presale townhouse collection on River Drive in a premier waterfront community. This spacious 4-bedroom, 3.5-bathroom home offers a thoughtfully designed living space with 2 parking stalls, including 3 ensuites and a powder room. Features include European-brand kitchen appliances, engineered hardwood flooring, 9' ceilings on the main level, and centralized geothermal air conditioning for year-round comfort. Residents enjoy an exceptional lifestyle with a 4,000 sq. ft. riverside dyke, clubhouse with party room, gym, indoor pool and hot tub, and outdoor BBQ area.
